final:
module SRAM_16bit (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [3:0] address,
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire read_enable,
    input wire write_enable,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory [15:0]; // 16 words of 16 bits each

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (write_enable) begin memory[address] <= data_in ; // Write data to memory
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (read_enable) begin data_out <= memory[address] ; // Read data from memory
  end
  end
endmodule
